skill.name: frontend
skill.description: Build stunning, high-performance web interfaces with premium design aesthetics and modern architecture.

skill.name: performance-pro
skill.description: Deep optimization for execution speed, algorithmic efficiency, and memory usage.

skill.name: human-coder
skill.description: Professional human-like communication. Eliminates AI markers and excessive emojis.

skill.name: prompt-engineer
skill.description: Craft precise, effective prompts for LLMs to maximize output quality and consistency.

skill.name: css-master
skill.description: Deep CSS mastery: layouts, custom properties, cascade layers, and cutting-edge techniques.

skill.name: animation-expert
skill.description: Craft fluid micro-interactions, page transitions, and physics-based animations that delight users.

skill.name: creative-ui-pro
skill.description: Create visually stunning, award-worthy interfaces using advanced CSS and modern design trends.
